CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public."standalone_postgres_source_data_table"("userId" text, "userName" text, email text, timestamp text, action text);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public."distributed_postgres_source_data_table"("userId" text, "userName" text, email text, timestamp text, action text);

BEGIN ATOMIC DECLARE CONTINUE HANDLER FOR SQLSTATE '42704' BEGIN END; EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'DROP TABLE DB2INST1.standalone_db2_source_data_table'; EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'CREATE TABLE DB2INST1.standalone_db2_source_data_table ("userId" VARCHAR(255), "userName" VARCHAR(255), "email" VARCHAR(255), "timestamp" VARCHAR(255), "action" VARCHAR(255))'; END

BEGIN ATOMIC DECLARE CONTINUE HANDLER FOR SQLSTATE '42704' BEGIN END; EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'DROP TABLE DB2INST1.distributed_db2_source_data_table'; EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'CREATE TABLE DB2INST1.distributed_db2_source_data_table ("userId" VARCHAR(255), "userName" VARCHAR(255), "email" VARCHAR(255), "timestamp" VARCHAR(255), "action" VARCHAR(255))'; END

IF OBJECT_ID('[dbo].[standalone_sqlserver_source_data_table]', 'U') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE [dbo].[standalone_sqlserver_source_data_table]; CREATE TABLE [dbo].[standalone_sqlserver_source_data_table]([userId] NVARCHAR(255), [userName] NVARCHAR(255), [email] NVARCHAR(255), [timestamp] NVARCHAR(255), [action] NVARCHAR(255));

IF OBJECT_ID('[dbo].[distributed_sqlserver_source_data_table]', 'U') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE [dbo].[distributed_sqlserver_source_data_table]; CREATE TABLE [dbo].[distributed_sqlserver_source_data_table]([userId] NVARCHAR(255), [userName] NVARCHAR(255), [email] NVARCHAR(255), [timestamp] NVARCHAR(255), [action] NVARCHAR(255));

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `standalone_mysql_source_data_table`; CREATE TABLE `standalone_mysql_source_data_table`(`userId` VARCHAR(255), `userName` VARCHAR(255), `email` VARCHAR(255), `timestamp` VARCHAR(255), `action` VARCHAR(255));

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `distributed_mysql_source_data_table`; CREATE TABLE `distributed_mysql_source_data_table`(`userId` VARCHAR(255), `userName` VARCHAR(255), `email` VARCHAR(255), `timestamp` VARCHAR(255), `action` VARCHAR(255));

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `standalone_mariadb_source_data_table`; CREATE TABLE `standalone_mariadb_source_data_table`(`userId` VARCHAR(255), `userName` VARCHAR(255), `email` VARCHAR(255), `timestamp` VARCHAR(255), `action` VARCHAR(255));

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `distributed_mariadb_source_data_table`; CREATE TABLE `distributed_mariadb_source_data_table`(`userId` VARCHAR(255), `userName` VARCHAR(255), `email` VARCHAR(255), `timestamp` VARCHAR(255), `action` VARCHAR(255));
BEGIN EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'DROP TABLE "SYSTEM"."standalone_oracle_source_data_table"'; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN IF SQLCODE != -942 THEN RAISE; END IF; END;

BEGIN EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'DROP TABLE "SYSTEM"."distributed_oracle_source_data_table"'; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN IF SQLCODE != -942 THEN RAISE; END IF; END;
